title: Breakwave Bi-Weekly Tanker Report - November 19, 2024
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2024-11-19_20241112dry-87w355-gtr32_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_3d523e4cef6e.png
· VLCC Market Faces Mixed Signals: Rate Rebound Amid China's Shifting Crude Strategy and Weaker Demand - The beginning of Bahri week brought encouraging developments for Very Large Crude Carrier ( VLCC ) owners, as rates improved in both East and West African markets. Despite indications of slowing VLCC activity, market rates showed resilience and gained momentum as the week progressed. While this recovery has inspired optimism for further rate increases, the outlook for December remains uncertain .
